status: draft
shortDescription: "The body of a for statement executes at most once"
shortCorrection: "The body of a for statement executes repeatedly, as long as the condition holds"

  relation: Dual
inOtherPl:

  - id: ssj4

---
The body of the `for`-statement executes either one or zero times
depending on whether the condition holds or not.

frontmatter.shortDescription: The body of a for statement executes at most once
frontmatter.shortCorrection: The body of a for statement executes repeatedly, as long as the condition holds
